chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

title: Chain 1/8: Book the Hotel
scene: 你计划去纽约玩，打电话确认酒店预订。（对话链：城市旅游）

turns.en: Hello, Manhattan Hotel front desk.

turns.cn: 我订了下周三大床房，张伟，住三晚。
turns.en: I booked a king room next Wednesday, Zhang Wei, three nights.

turns.cn: 找到了，含早餐，下午三点入住。
turns.en: Found it. Breakfast included. Check-in is three PM.
Can I store luggage early?
Yes, from ten AM.
Thank you. See you then.

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

title: Chain 2/8: Hotel Check-in
scene: 你到达酒店前台办理入住。（对话链：城市旅游）

turns.cn: 您好，欢迎入住！请问有预订吗？
turns.en: Hello, welcome! Do you have a reservation?
Yes, the name is Zhang Wei.
I found it. One king room for three nights.
Is breakfast included?

turns.cn: 是的，早上六点半到十点半。
turns.en: Yes, it's served from 6:30 to 10:30 AM.
Your room is on the eighth floor, room 808.
What's the Wi-Fi password?

turns.cn: 在房卡套上，祝您住得愉快！
turns.en: It's on the key card sleeve. Enjoy your stay!

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

title: Chain 3/8: Tourist Information
scene: 你在旅游咨询中心询问景点信息。（对话链：城市旅游）

turns.cn: 你好，这附近有什么值得看的景点？
turns.en: Hi, what are the must-see attractions around here?

turns.cn: 自由女神像和中央公园都很受欢迎。
turns.en: The Statue of Liberty and Central Park are very popular.
How do I get to the Statue of Liberty?

turns.cn: 可以坐地铁到南街海港，然后坐船。
turns.en: Take the subway to South Street Seaport, then catch a ferry.
Do I need to buy ferry tickets in advance?

turns.cn: 建议提前在网上订，周末人很多。
turns.en: I'd recommend booking online. Weekends get very crowded.

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

title: Chain 4/8: Take a Taxi
scene: 你在路边拦出租车去码头。（对话链：城市旅游）

turns.cn: 你好，去南街海港码头，走高速可以吗？
turns.en: Hi, to South Street Seaport pier, please. Can we take the highway?
Sure. It should take about twenty minutes.
My ferry is at ten. Will we make it?
No problem. Traffic looks good right now.
Could you drop me off at the entrance?
Of course.

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

title: Chain 5/8: Ask for a Photo
scene: 你在自由女神像前，请路人帮忙拍照。（对话链：城市旅游）

turns.cn: 打扰一下，能帮我们拍张照吗？
turns.en: Excuse me, could you take a photo for us?
Sure. Portrait or landscape?

turns.cn: 竖拍，把雕像拍进去就行。
turns.en: Portrait, please. Include the statue.
Done. How does it look?

turns.cn: 很好，谢谢！我帮你也拍一张？
turns.en: Great, thanks! Want me to take one for you?
Yes, please. Thank you!

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

title: Chain 6/8: Buy Souvenirs
scene: 你在景点小店买纪念品。（对话链：城市旅游）

turns.cn: 看看纪念品吧，都是本地手工的。
turns.en: Check out our souvenirs. They're all locally made.
How much is this magnet?
Five dollars, or three for twelve.

turns.cn: 那我买三个吧，可以刷卡吗？
turns.en: I'll take three. Do you accept cards?
Yes, but there's a ten-dollar minimum for cards.

turns.cn: 没问题，再加一张明信片。
turns.en: No problem. I'll add a postcard too.

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

title: Chain 7/8: Room Problem
scene: 晚上回酒店，发现隔壁太吵。（对话链：城市旅游）

turns.cn: 隔壁房间太吵了，能换房吗？
turns.en: The room next door is too loud. Can I switch rooms?

turns.cn: 抱歉，我查一下空房……八零五可以吗？
turns.en: Sorry about that. Let me check. Would 805 work?
Away from the elevator would be better.

turns.cn: 八零二在走廊尽头，现在帮您换。
turns.en: 802 is at the end of the hall. I'll move you now.
Thank you. I'll move my luggage myself.

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

title: Chain 8/8: Check Out
scene: 最后一天，你在前台退房去机场。（对话链：城市旅游）

turns.en: Checking out? Key cards, please.

turns.cn: 808，迷你吧没动，能存行李到下午吗？
turns.en: 808. I didn't use the minibar. Can you hold my bags until afternoon?
Yes, complimentary storage until four PM.
The bill looks fine. Card, please.

turns.cn: 谢谢光临，祝您一路平安。
turns.en: Thank you for staying. Have a safe trip.
Thank you. I enjoyed my stay.
